intent: Write a product-vs-community comparison on 'reading habits starter kit' for someone rebuilding a reading practice. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics and office-products categories and collect at least 3 reading-adjacent products (reading light, bookmark/organizer, e-reader accessory). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/books AND /f/LifeProTips for posts on how to read more, format choice (paper vs digital), or anti-distraction tricks. Collect at least 2 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present the storefront picks with stats, (b) contrast product-based answers with behavior-based answers from Reddit, (c) recommend either a $50 product path or a zero-product habit path based on which Reddit thinks is more effective. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. Frames product vs habit as an explicit dichotomy.
